_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Determine if cybersecurity workforce management policies and procedures comply with legal and organizational requirements
reference_document_element_description: Ability to translate complex regulatory requirements into clear, actionable organizational policies and operational procedures that non-legal staff can implement and verify.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Ability RC-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-002 (RC, cosine: 0.497), RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.496).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.497). Shared vocabulary: [legal, organizational, policies, procedures, requirements]. NICE-only terms [comply, cybersecurity, determine, management, workforce] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, actionable, clear, complex, implement, non] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.886, R=0.874). Balanced P/R — the 14-word NICE element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Determine if cybersecurity workforce management policies and procedures comply w" and "Ability to translate complex regulatory requirements into clear, actionable orga" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.534 ≈ STS 0.497 (gap 0.037). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [legal, organizational, policies, procedures, requirements] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 21.4%. Shared tokens: [legal, organizational, policies, procedures, requirements]. NICE-only: [comply, cybersecurity, determine, management, workforce]. WIDAI-only: [ability, actionable, clear, complex, implement, non].
